name: Santa Rosa Resources Corp.
summary: Santa Rosa Resources Corp. does not have significant operations. The company is exploring potential business opportunities in various markets. Previously, it was engaged in the provision of billing, payments processing, call center, and ISP services. The company was formerly known as Monexa Technologies Corp. and changed its name to Santa Rosa Resources Corp. in March 2012. Santa Rosa Resources Corp. was incorporated in 1989 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
